title: acalypha pruriens
intro: Acalypha pruriens, also known as the itch plant or gokshura, is a type of succulent plant native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Acalypha pruriens include its ability to improve kidney function, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system. In Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal preparations such as powders, decoctions, and oils, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
